text: Kaustubh Kanodia ♂phone+91-9506036600 |/envel⌢pekanodiakaustubh@gmail.com |/linkedinLinkedIn |/githubGitHub EDUCATION Vellore Institute of Technology, Vellore Vellore, India B.Tech - Information Technology August 2023 – August 2027 TECHNICAL SKILLS Languages : GoLang, Java, Python, C/C++, SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS Technologies/Frameworks : React.js, Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, Next.js, React Native, TailwindCSS, Prisma, Shadcn, NumPy, Matplotlib Developer Tools : Git, GitHub, Burpsuite, GitHub, Vercel, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Android Studio, Expo, VMWare, VirtualBox, Kali Linux, Ubuntu, Figma, Canva EXPERIENCE Web Development Intern May 2025 - June 2025 SemGuru - Educational Platform Development Remote •Developed a full-stack educational platform connecting students with academic resources and alumni mentorship using React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL . •Implemented secure authentication system with Google OAuth 2.0 and JWT , role-based access control for Students, Alumni, and Admin users. •Built real-time messaging system using Socket.IO enabling mentor-student conversations with chat request workflow and approval system. •Designed comprehensive admin dashboard for content management, alumni approval/rejection, and course management with file upload capabilities using Supabase storage . •Created responsive UI with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components , featuring course catalog with module-based learning structure and filtering capabilities.
